COTE is America’s first and only Michelin-starred Korean Steakhouse and the Best Steakhouse in North America.*

Our mantra is simple

🥩 + 🔥 + 🍸 = 😊

Grilled steak, fire, and cocktail. Combination of steak, fire, and cocktail creates a delightful experience.
COTE blends the conviviality of Korean barbeque together with the hallmarks of a classic American steakhouse. The result is a unique and interactive atmosphere, accompanied by the highest quality USDA Prime beef, an impeccable award-winning 1200+ label wine list, and a suite of classic-but-creative cocktails.
‍
*According to World's 101 Best Steak Restaurants

THE COTE EXPERIENCE

Meet Our Meat

Meet Our Meat

We’ve got some serious beef: Everything we serve is USDA Prime—that’s the top 5% of American cattle—or above, and American Wagyu (a crossbreed of Japanese Wagyu and American Black Angus).

Explore Our Menus

Sip In Style

Sip In Style

Elevate your experience with an impeccable 1200+ label wine list, and a suite of classic-but-creative cocktails, all curated by our award-winning sommeliers and bartenders.

Hospitality-Forward

Hospitality-Forward

We're committed to providing an exceptional dining experience beyond the food, where attention to detail, personalized care, and a little fun seamlessly blend to create unforgettable moments for our guests.

Careers

At COTE, we believe that our success stems from the passion and dedication of our team members. We foster a culture of excellence across all positions, from reservationists to line cooks.

New York, NY 10010

Hours
  • Monday - Saturday: 5PM – 2AM
  • Closed Sundays
About

We do not accept reservations, but seat completed parties on a first come, first serve basis. The largest party size we accommodate is up to 6. If you would like to visit Undercote with a larger group, please email event@cotenyc.com to coordinate a visit.
